pkgmetadata.longdescription: Tensors and dynamic neural networks in Python with strong GPU acceleration. PyTorch is the runtime backend for many Python ML packages (openai-whisper, pyannote-audio, etc.) and ships here as prebuilt manylinux x86_64 wheels pulled from PyPI per CPython impl; no local compilation occurs.

use.flag: Enable CUDA 12.6 GPU acceleration (requires operator to pre-stage CUDA wheels at https://artifactory.delivery.haven.pw/gentoo-distfiles/ from download.pytorch.org; geo-fence blocks direct fetch from most build hosts)
